message:
feat(dashboard): add sparkline charts to resources panel

Add live sparkline visualizations for CPU, memory, and network metrics
in the VM detail Resources panel. Includes color-coded values (red >80%,
yellow >50%) and an expand/collapse toggle for larger chart views.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
